name: SCORE
description_short: SCORE Central Ohio provides free, confidential one-on-one business mentoring and workshops to entrepreneurs and small business owners in the Greater Central Ohio area.
description_long:
SCORE Central Ohio is a nonprofit organization that serves the small business community in the Greater Central Ohio region. The organization has a long track record of supporting entrepreneurs, having been recognized as Ohio District Chapter of the Year in 2022 for its leadership and commitment to serving small businesses. The chapter operates as part of the larger SCORE network, a national resource backed by the Small Business Administration.

SCORE Central Ohio offers free and confidential one-on-one business counseling by phone, email, and in-person meetings with experienced volunteer business mentors. Beyond individual mentoring, they conduct workshops for both startup entrepreneurs and seasoned small business owners covering topics like business planning, financial management, marketing, bookkeeping, S.W.O.T. analysis, and digital marketing strategy. Workshops are offered both online and in-person, with most being free or low-cost, and are led by industry experts who provide practical tools and resources.

What distinguishes SCORE Central Ohio is its volunteer-based model and complete lack of cost to clients for mentoring services. The organization also maintains a robust resource partner network, connecting small business owners to complementary services from organizations like the SBA Columbus District Office, Columbus ECDI, Women's Business Center, and various tax preparation resources. This integrated approach helps entrepreneurs access a broader ecosystem of support beyond what SCORE directly provides.

As a free nonprofit service, SCORE Central Ohio is fundamentally limited to educational mentoring and workshops rather than direct financial products or services. While highly valuable for planning and strategy, the organization cannot provide funding, credit repair, or other direct financial solutions. The quality of mentoring depends on volunteer availability and expertise, and those seeking immediate financial assistance will need to look elsewhere.
address: 65 E State St Suite 1350, Columbus, OH 43215

company_info.headquarters: 65 E State St Suite 1350, Columbus, OH 43215

pros: Completely free one-on-one business mentoring by experienced volunteer mentors
Free and low-cost workshops taught by industry experts covering practical business topics
Confidential counseling available by phone, email, and in-person to accommodate different preferences
Recognized as Ohio District Chapter of the Year in 2022, demonstrating quality and community impact
Extensive resource partner network connecting businesses to SBA, tax prep, women's business centers, and social enterprises
Serves both startup entrepreneurs and seasoned business owners with relevant, tiered content
Offers certificate programs for comprehensive business education at no or minimal cost
cons: No direct financial products or funding available—mentoring only, no loans or capital
Quality and availability of mentoring dependent on volunteer mentor supply and expertise
Limited to Central Ohio geography; not a statewide or national service
Cannot provide legal, tax, or accounting advice—focuses on general business guidance
Workshop scheduling and formats may not accommodate all business owner schedules
best_for: Startup entrepreneurs who need free guidance on business planning and launch strategy
Small business owners seeking to improve financial management, marketing, or operational efficiency
Entrepreneurs without budget for paid business consultants or coaching services
Central Ohio business owners who want to network and access local SBA and economic development resources
diagnosis: SCORE Central Ohio is best for entrepreneurs and small business owners in the Greater Central Ohio area who need free, confidential guidance on business planning, operations, marketing, and financial management from experienced mentors. The critical caveat is that this is a nonprofit educational and mentoring service only—it provides no funding, loans, credit repair, or direct financial products, making it a complement to rather than replacement for business financing or professional accounting/legal services.
services: Free one-on-one business mentoring by phone
Free one-on-one business mentoring by email
Blogging and SEO strategy for small business
Resource partner referrals to SBA, tax prep, and economic development services
